title: epipactis helleborine subsp. bithynica
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. bithynica, also known as Bithynian helleborine, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Helleborine section of the genus Epipactis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. bithynica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, teas, or tinctures, and can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
